title: Acne & Scar Correction
desc: Medically proven protocols that control breakouts, fade post-acne marks, and smooth scarred skin. Visible results from Session 1.

title: Aesthetic Add-Ons
desc: Fillers, and other aesthetic enhancements to complement your core treatment plan for a refreshed, natural look.

title: Anti-Aging Treatment
desc: HIFU, RF, and PRP-based rejuvenation that reduces fine lines, tightens skin, and restores youthful glow without surgery.

title: Body Contouring
desc: Non-invasive fat reduction and body shaping treatments for a sculpted, confident silhouette.

title: Brow Enhancement
desc: Microblading and brow shaping for perfectly defined, natural-looking eyebrows that beautifully frame your face.

title: CO₂ Laser
desc: Fractional CO₂ laser resurfacing for scars, wrinkles, and uneven skin texture. Clinically proven, long-lasting results.

title: Eczema Treatment
desc: Personalised treatment plans to manage eczema flare-ups, reduce inflammation, and restore the skin's natural barrier.

title: Facials & Chemical Peels
desc: Medical-grade hydra facials and peels that deep-cleanse, exfoliate, and refresh your skin for instant visible radiance.

title: Hair Transplant
desc: Restore your natural hairline with advanced FUE techniques. Permanent, natural-looking results supervised by our dermatologist.

title: HIFU / RF / MNRF
desc: Non-surgical skin tightening and lifting using high-intensity focused ultrasound and radiofrequency energy. Zero downtime.

title: Laser Hair Removal
desc: Permanent, painless hair reduction using advanced diode laser technology. Safe for all skin tones with long-lasting smooth results.

title: Laser Tattoo Removal
desc: Safe, effective tattoo fading using advanced laser technology. Works on all ink colours and skin tones. Supervised by MD Dermatologist.

title: Lash Enhancements
desc: Professional lash lift, tint, and extension services for fuller, longer-looking lashes that frame your eyes beautifully.

title: Lip Pigmentation
desc: Correct dark, uneven lip colour with targeted laser and topical treatments for naturally pink, healthy-looking lips.

title: Mesotherapy
desc: Micro-injections of vitamins and nutrients to rejuvenate skin, reduce pigmentation, and boost natural glow from within.

title: Micro Pigmentation
desc: Semi-permanent cosmetic tattooing to enhance eyebrows, lips, and hairline for a natural, defined look.

title: PICO / Carbon Laser
desc: Picosecond and carbon laser treatments for deep pigmentation, open pores, dull skin, and overall skin brightening.

title: Pigmentation & Melasma
desc: Targeted protocols to even out dark patches, sun damage, and melasma — carefully customised for Indian skin tones.

title: PRP Treatment for Face
desc: Platelet-rich plasma facial rejuvenation to boost collagen, reduce fine lines, and restore a youthful, radiant glow.

title: Psoriasis Treatment
desc: Personalised treatment plans combining topical therapy and light-based treatments to control psoriasis flare-ups.

title: RF Microneedling
desc: Combines radiofrequency energy with microneedling to tighten skin, reduce scars, and stimulate collagen production.

title: Scar Revision
desc: Advanced laser and filler-based techniques to minimise the appearance of surgical, injury, and acne scars effectively.

title: Skin Tightening
desc: Non-invasive treatments using RF and ultrasound energy to firm sagging skin and restore a youthful, lifted appearance.

title: Stretch Mark Revision
desc: Laser and microneedling treatments to fade stretch marks, improve skin texture, and restore confidence in your skin.

title: Tan Removal
desc: Targeted laser and peel-based treatments to remove stubborn sun tan, restore even skin tone, and reveal brighter skin.

title: Vitiligo Treatment
desc: Clinically supervised phototherapy and topical protocols to manage vitiligo and restore natural skin pigmentation.

title: Wart Removal
desc: Safe, precise laser and cryotherapy-based wart removal with minimal scarring and quick recovery time.
